metadata.goal_sentence: Create a file named fizzbuzz.mjs at the repository root that exports a function fizzbuzz(n) returning the string 'Fizz' when n is divisible by 3, 'Buzz' when divisible by 5, 'FizzBuzz' when divisible by both 3 and 5, and the number itself as a string otherwise; and create fizzbuzz.test.mjs using node:test that asserts fizzbuzz(3)==='Fizz', fizzbuzz(5)==='Buzz', fizzbuzz(15)==='FizzBuzz', and fizzbuzz(2)==='2'.
